comments.welcome_message: Welcome to our circular economy community! Share items you no longer need, and find treasures others are sharing.

messages.title: Messages
messages.no_messages_yet: No messages yet. Start the conversation!
messages.no_conversations_description: When you message someone about an item, it will appear here.

map.see_distances: See distances and find nearby items

email_confirmation.sent_confirmation: We've sent you a confirmation link to

share.please_wait: Please wait while we locate the shared item.
share.item_removed_or_invalid: The item may have been removed or the link is invalid.

settings.danger_zone_description: Irreversible actions that affect your account

settings.your_data_description: Download a copy of your data or request data deletion.

settings.account_deletion_description: Your account and data have been deleted. Redirecting to home page...
